title: Trapped!
description: Trapped! Adds a lot of unique traps and gadgets to help prank friends or defend your base.
body:
![Trapped! Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dd9bc5f822af85e0b3f927abf8558b9a9c2b1950.png)

## Mod Description:

This mod adds a ton of new blocks and gadgets to help troll friends or defend your base from other players or mobs.

## Mod Features:

Spike Traps (4 Variations)

Tesla Coils (3 Variations)

Surge Protector

Cracked/Pitfall Traps (3 Variations)

Landmine

Sawblade

Bear Trap

Razor Wire

Barbed Wire

Fake Ore Bomb

Igniter

Healpool

Fan 

Slime Gate

Stun Gun

Saw

Fan Blade

Wires

Iron Plate

Module

Push/Pull Module

Electric Module


## Use JEI (Just Enough Items) for recipes
